macro.title: US wholesale prices surged 4% last month after the war in Iran sent energy prices soaring - AP News
macro.summary: U.S. wholesale prices surged last month as the Iran war drove up the cost of energy. The Labor Department reported Tuesday that its producer price index — which measures inflation before it hits consumers — rose 0.5% from February and 4% from March 2025. Ener…

macro.title: NVIDIA Launches Ising, the World’s First Open AI Models to Accelerate the Path to Useful Quantum Computers - NVIDIA Newsroom
macro.summary: NVIDIA today announced the world’s first family of open source quantum AI models, NVIDIA Ising, designed to help researchers and enterprises build quantum processors capable of running useful applications.
